---
title: "113-fst"
output: html_document
date: "2026-03-25"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning=FALSE, message = FALSE)
```

We can also look at Fst windows

SFLc0427	SFLc0428	0.139075		
SFLc0435	SFLc0650	0.188466	

Are related individuals

Keeping SFLc0428 and SFLc0435 because they are higher coverage

```{r}
m44<-read_csv("meta/meta44.csv")
m42<-m44 %>% filter(!specimen_id %in% c("SFLc0427","SFLc0650"))
mig <- m42 %>% filter(NewPhenotype =="SFF")
res <- m42 %>% filter(NewPhenotype =="SSS")
```

sample sizes are 21 & 21


```{r}
mig %>% select(Path) %>% write_tsv("bamlists/mig.bamlist", col_names = FALSE)
res %>% select(Path) %>% write_tsv("bamlists/res.bamlist", col_names = FALSE)
```

 bash 113-calc-sfs.sh
